mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns during rate cuts are statistically indistinguishable from baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer spending expectations and trigger negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in over 55% of triggered instances, or the signal shows no predictive power when unemployment rises above the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates broad-based domestic demand growth that drives corporate earnings revisions and positive equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 50% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a late-cycle expansion reflects capacity utilization approaching maximums, prompting market participants to price in imminent monetary tightening and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive during late-cycle industrial production surges, or the signal fails to predict direction when capacity utilization exceeds 85%.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly increases corporate revenue expectations and dividend payout capacity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns show no positive correlation with GDP growth, or the signal generates negative alpha after transaction costs over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI increase exceeding 0.4 percent signals accelerating inflation that forces central banks to tighten policy expectations, compressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally following high inflation prints, or the threshold fails to separate positive and negative return regimes with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payroll growth combined with rising industrial production confirms synchronized economic expansion that boosts equity risk premiums and drives positive forward returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative forward returns in over 50% of observations, or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for monetary policy shocks.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts during a post-shock recovery phase indicate weakening consumer confidence and reduced construction sector demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Housing start declines during recovery phases coincide with equity rallies, or the signal shows no predictive power when mortgage rates fall below 3.5%.
